station_basic.city: CrAdLE, Entrepreneurship Development Institute of India (EDII), P.O. Bhat - 382 428, Dist. Gandhinagar,  Gujarat, INDIA ;

station_details.companyDescription:
Pusaaka is a design-led brand rooted in Indian craftsmanship, creating heirloom-quality products that are both

culturally significant and environmentally conscious. We work closely with artisan communities across India,

particularly in reviving languishing crafts through contemporary design interventions. Our material philosophy

emphasizes the use of biodegradable and plant-based alternatives, such as pineapple and banana fibre leather.

Beyond products, Pusaaka actively engages in craft preservation through documentation, design-led skill

development, and interactive cultural programming. We are keen to contribute meaningfully through exhibitions, retail

participation, and live artisan-led workshops that foster deeper public engagement with Indian crafts.
